pub fn vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::decode_file_with_rules(file_bytes: &[u8], rules: &vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::DecodeRules) -> vyre::error::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::DecodedRegion>>
pub fn vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::decode_frontier<F>(base_offset: usize, bytes: &[u8], rules: &vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::DecodeRules, decode_one: &mut F, state: &mut vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::FrontierState<'_>) -> vyre::error::Result<()> where F: core::ops::function::FnMut(vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::codec::format::DecodeFormat, &[u8], &vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::DecodeRules) -> vyre::error::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::DecodedRegion>>
pub fn vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::decode_hex(input: &[u8]) -> vyre::error::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::decode_regions(input: &[u8], format: vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::codec::format::DecodeFormat, rules: &vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::DecodeRules) -> vyre::error::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::DecodedRegion>>
pub fn vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::decode_unicode(input: &[u8]) -> vyre::error::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::decode_url(input: &[u8]) -> vyre::error::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<u8>>
pub fn vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::entropy_map_cpu(data: &[u8], window_size: usize) -> core::result::Result<alloc::vec::Vec<f32>, vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::EntropyError>
pub fn vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::find_high_entropy_regions(entropy: &[f32], threshold: f32) -> alloc::vec::Vec<(usize, usize)>
pub fn vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::find_high_entropy_regions_with_window(entropy: &[f32], threshold: f32, window_size: usize) -> alloc::vec::Vec<(usize, usize)>
pub fn vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::push_region(base_offset: usize, bytes: &[u8], region: vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::DecodedRegion, state: &mut vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::FrontierState<'_>) -> vyre::error::Result<()>
pub fn vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::shannon_entropy(bytes: &[u8]) -> f32
pub fn vyre_wgpu::engine::decode::stable_hash(bytes: &[u8]) -> u64

pub trait vyre_wgpu::runtime::TierPolicy: core::marker::Send + core::marker::Sync
pub fn vyre_wgpu::runtime::TierPolicy::eviction_candidate(&self, tier: usize, entries: &rustc_hash::FxHashMap<u64, vyre_wgpu::runtime::cache::tiered_cache::CacheEntry>, tracker: &vyre_wgpu::runtime::cache::lru::AccessTracker) -> core::option::Option<u64>
pub fn vyre_wgpu::runtime::TierPolicy::should_promote(&self, key: u64, stats: &vyre_wgpu::runtime::cache::tiered_cache::AccessStats) -> bool
impl vyre_wgpu::runtime::cache::tiered_cache::TierPolicy for vyre_wgpu::runtime::cache::tiered_cache::LruPolicy
pub fn vyre_wgpu::runtime::cache::tiered_cache::LruPolicy::eviction_candidate(&self, _tier: usize, entries: &rustc_hash::FxHashMap<u64, vyre_wgpu::runtime::cache::tiered_cache::CacheEntry>, tracker: &vyre_wgpu::runtime::cache::lru::AccessTracker) -> core::option::Option<u64>
pub fn vyre_wgpu::runtime::cache::tiered_cache::LruPolicy::should_promote(&self, _key: u64, stats: &vyre_wgpu::runtime::cache::tiered_cache::AccessStats) -> bool

pub fn vyre_wgpu::runtime::cached_device() -> vyre::error::Result<&'static (wgpu::api::device::Device, wgpu::api::queue::Queue)>
pub fn vyre_wgpu::runtime::compile_compute_pipeline(device: &wgpu::api::device::Device, label: &str, wgsl_source: &str, entry_point: &str) -> vyre::error::Result<wgpu::api::compute_pipeline::ComputePipeline>
